title: helenium bolanderi
intro: Helenium bolanderi, also known as Bolander's sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It is a member of the sunflower family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helenium bolanderi include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and respiratory issues. Helenium bolanderi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
